34 = Hospice. A facility, other than a patient’s home, in which palliative and supportive care for 
terminally ill patients and their families are provided. 

35–40 = Unassigned. N/A 

41 = Ambulance — Land. A land vehicle specifically designed, equipped and staffed for lifesaving 
and transporting the sick or injured. 

42 = Ambulance — Air or Water. An air or water vehicle specifically
